zh.of Bramhall, England: 英國英格蘭爾布拉哈爾
zh.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Davenport I是John Davenport和Alice de Bromehall的兒子，於1365年出生在英國英格蘭爾布拉哈爾。他於1397年3月14日與Joan Assheton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1436年11月在英國爾布拉哈爾享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Davenport I是John Davenport和Alice de Bromehall的儿子，于1365年出生在英国英格兰爾布拉哈爾。他于1397年3月14日与Joan Assheton在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1436年11月在英国爾布拉哈爾享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Davenport I was born in 1365, in Bramhall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of John Davenport and Alice de Bromehall. He married Joan Assheton on 14 March 1397, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in November 1436, in Bramhall, Cheshire, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Davenport I est né en 1365, à Bramhall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John Davenport et Alice de Bromehall. Il a épousé Joan Assheton le 14 mars 1397, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en novembre 1436, à Bramhall, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Davenport I wurde 1365 in Bramhall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von John Davenport und Alice de Bromehall geboren. Er hat am 14. März 1397 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Joan Assheton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im November 1436 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Bramhall, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Davenport I è nato il nel 1365 nel Bramhall, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di John Davenport e Alice de Bromehall. Lui sposato Joan Assheton il 14 marzo 1397, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel novembre 1436, nel Bramhall, Cheshire, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Davenport Iは1365年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブラムハルでJohn DavenportとAlice de Bromehallの息子として生まれた。1397年3月14日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでJoan Asshetonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1436年11月にイギリスチェシュアイアブラムハルで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Davenport I(은)는 1365년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브램홀에서 John Davenport(와)과 Alice de Bromehall의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1397년 3월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Joan Assheton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1436년 11월 영국 체실르 브램홀에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele faleceu em novembro de 1436, em Bramhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Davenport I родился в 1365 г. в местности брамхолл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали John Davenport и Alice de Bromehall. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Assheton 14 марта 1397 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер ноябрь 1436 г. в местности брамхолл, чешир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Davenport I nació en 1365, en Bramhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de John Davenport y Alice de Bromehall. Se casó con Joan Assheton el 14 de marzo de 1397, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en noviembre de 1436, en Bramhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
